title: Royal Chalcedony Shield
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}}
{{Medal
|image=[[File:Horoxryyder.jpg]]
|name=Royal Chalcedony Shield
|awarded by=[[High Council of Alderaan]]<ref name="Gov">The Royal Chalcedony Shield's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' states that the government of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] awarded the Royal Chalcedony Shield, while the [[High Council of Alderaan]]'s entry in the same encyclopedia states that the High Council was the governing body on Alderaan. Therefore, this article treats the High Council of Alderaan as the governing body that awarded the Royal Chalcedony Shield.</ref>
|eligibility=Any being (traditionally [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanians]])<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|news/13321_3.html|Senator Horox Ryyder Retires}}</ref>
|recipients=[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]]<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />
|prerequisites=*Champion of civic virtue<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|117|Royal Chalcedony Shield}}</ref>
*Possessor of uncompromising moral convictions<ref name="CSWE" />
|upgrades=
|first awarded=
|last awarded=
}}
{{Quote|For your peerless championing of civic virtue and uncompromising moral convictions, Alderaan looks to adopt you, Horox Ryyder, as a heroic son. While she is saddened by your departure from the government, she and all her people are indebted to your countless contributions to peace and freedom.|Senator Bail Organa, presenting the Royal Chalcedony Shield to retiring Senator Horox Ryyder|<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />}}
The '''Royal Chalcedony Shield''' was a medal awarded by the [[High Court of Alderaan]] to recognize a being's achievements in peacemaking. The medal was traditionally awarded to [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanians]], but non-Alderaanians could receive the medal on occasion. The [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]] was one of the few such individuals to receive a Royal Chalcedony Shield, being presented the award upon his retirement in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] by [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] Senator [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]].

==Description==
The Royal Chalcedony Shield was a prestigious medal<ref name="CSWE" /> given out by the [[High Court of Alderaan]]—the governing body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]<ref name="Gov" />—to honor those deemed champions of civic virtue and possessors of uncompromising moral convictions.<ref name="CSWE" /> The Royal Chalcedony Shield was typically awarded to native [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanians]], but non-Alderaanians could occasionally be given the medal; as such, these recipients would be officially adopted by Alderaan. The medal was [[Color/Legends|silver]] in color and was attached to a purple sash that could be worn around the recipient's [[Limb/Legends|neck]].<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />

==Notable recipients==
[[File:Horox.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Senator Horox Ryyder]]

===Horox Ryyder===
{{Main|Horox Ryyder/Legends}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], Horox Ryyder represented his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During his tenure in the Senate, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Ryyder was known to be a calm, fair-minded [[Politics/Legends|politician]],<ref name="db">{{DB|character|horoxryyder|Ryyder, Horox}}</ref> one of the few senators who took public measures to end the widespread corruption in the Senate,<ref name="cod">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref> and strove to bring about peace whenever possible. As a result, Ryyder formed a close friendship with Alderaan Senator [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]] and later with Antilles's successor in the Senate, [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]].<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during a small gathering of friends on Gravlex Med, Ryyder announced his retirement from the Senate after more than fifty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of service. Both Antilles and Organa were in attendance, and, during the ceremony, Organa presented Ryyder with the Royal Chalcedony Shield for Ryyder's devotion to justice and equality in the Senate. The [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reported on Ryyder's retirement, including Ryyder's receiving of the Royal Chalcedony Shield, as he was one of the few non-Alderaanians to be given the esteemed award.<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Royal Chalcedony Award first appeared in the [[2002]] [[in-universe]] ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48]]'' article ''Senator Horox Ryyder Retires''. The medal was later given a small entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="Senator Horox Ryyder Retires" />
